title: write-deny-policy.yaml
description: SOFT (detective) write deny-list. Default-empty is inert (allow all). The HARD floor (core-immune + harness/** binary) is a code constant in write_deny_policy.py, never configured here.

soft_rules.description: ordered rules, last-match-wins; each is exactly one {deny|allow: glob}

deny.description: glob that logs deny_soft_hit but is still allowed

allow.description: glob that carves back out of an earlier deny
